# Purpose
The header `Application-layer PULSEv2 Protocols` indicates a section or category within a document or configuration file that pertains to protocols used at the application layer of the PULSEv2 system. This section likely organizes or lists specific protocols relevant to the PULSEv2 application layer, which may involve communication standards or methods used by the application.
